task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OSCAR EMR main dashboard, schedule view, or navigation menu indicating the user 'oscardoc' is logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for and selected the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Margaret Wilson' selected in a patient search window, demographic screen, or waiting list entry form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected or created the 'Orthopedic Surgery' waiting list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Orthopedic Surgery' visible in a waiting list dropdown menu, category selection, or list creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the required note for the waiting list entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Awaiting total hip replacement - left side. Moderate osteoarthritis. Target surgery date Q2 2025.' typed into a text area or note field in the waiting list form.

task_completion.description: Verify the waiting list entry was saved and appears on the list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a confirmation screen or the actual 'Orthopedic Surgery' waiting list view showing 'Margaret Wilson' as an entry with the specified note visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) with the URL pointing to localhost:8080/oscar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (e.g., INSERT INTO) or curl requests interacting directly with the database or API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the result in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the final result is displayed within the OSCAR EMR web interface, not in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is Margaret Wilson. The target waiting list is exactly 'Orthopedic Surgery'. The exact note that must be entered is: 'Awaiting total hip replacement - left side. Moderate osteoarthritis. Target surgery date Q2 2025.' Look for the keywords 'hip replacement', 'left side', 'osteoarthritis', and '2025' in the final saved entry.
